content.full_text:
June 19, 1991

Karen Mathews
County Clerk Recorder
912 11th Street
Modesto, CA 95354

RE: Combined Campaign Report
Our File No. I-91-294

Dear Ms. Mathews:

This is to confirm advice provided to your office on June 12, 1991, regarding the campaign disclosure provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1/ This letter constitutes written advice under Section 84205.

Section 84205 states:

The Commission may by regulation or written advice permit candidates and committees to file campaign statements combining statements and reports required to be filed by this title.

A special bond measure election has been called for the Oakdale Rural Fire District. The election date is July 29, 1991. Because the period covered by the second preelection statement due in connection with the July 29, 1991 election (Section 84200.8) extends beyond the closing date for the semi-annual statement due for the first six months of 1991 (Section 84200), we believe it is appropriate for committees primarily formed to support or oppose the bond measure in that election to combine those two reports.

Therefore, campaign disclosure statements should be filed on the following schedule:

1/
Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

Karen Mathews  
Page Two

Type of Statement | Period Covered | Filing Deadline
1st Pre-Election (for July election) | Jan. 12/ - June 14 | June 19
2nd Pre-Election (for July election) Combined with semi-annual statement for the first half of 1991 | June 15 - July 12 | July 17
Semi-Annual | July 13 - Dec. 31 | Jan. 31, 1992

If you have any questions regarding the above, please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5662.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

by: Kevin S. Braaten-Moen
Political Reform Consultant

cc: Secretary of State

2/ The period covered by any statement begins on the day after the closing date of the last statement filed or January 1 if no previous statement has been filed.
